name: craft
description: Opinionated engineering-discipline tooling for Copilot CLI. Four workflow skills forming a research -> experiment -> implement pipeline (research: ground + triangulate + surface hypotheses; experiment: pre-register + measure + decide by rule; implementation: aim, design, deliver in validated slices; decompose: break a goal into roadmap/plan/item). Two stdio MCP servers on a shared git-backed storage adapter -- craft-journal (resume continuity + BM25 findings reuse) and craft-compose (roadmap->plan->item work composition with deterministic roll-up) -- and a Node hook dispatcher (resume injector, work-tree injector, draft seeder, findings-consult signal, failure capture). Cross-machine sync at the adapter. Host-agnostic. See README.md.
